brainstorming.scope: clarifying-question discipline; STRIP its spec-doc write/commit and its own approval gate (the orchestrator owns the gate); keep devforge's GitHub-issue staleness/claim-ledger check

writing-plans.scope: planning discipline (concrete files, test strategy, no placeholders); STRIP the docs/plans file-save and the subagent/inline execution handoff

feature-dev.scope: implement-only against the approved design.md; SKIP feature-dev's Discovery / clarifying-questions / architecture phases; may dispatch the devforge-code-explorer / devforge-code-architect agents for grounding only

staff-review.scope: apply to diff.patch; focus on correctness, edge cases, and test coverage

thermonuclear.scope: follow as instruction text (NOT Skill-invoked); apply maintainability standards to diff.patch — 1k-line file ceiling, no spaghetti branching, code-judo simplification; map presumptive-blockers to blocker/major

code-review.scope: keep the multi-agent + confidence-score method but RETARGET it: read iter-N/diff.patch + working tree instead of `gh pr diff`; DROP the PR-eligibility checks and the gh-pr-comment step; filter to score >= 80
